question.text: What is the lot size for USDINR options on Indian exchanges?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** USDINR options have the same lot size as USDINR futures: 1000 USD. The tick size for USDINR options is Rs 0.0025 (same as futures). The premium is quoted in INR per USD. **The Trap:** The lot size matches the corresponding futures contract. Other currency pairs also have 1000 units of base currency per lot. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series I Ch4 specifies USDINR option contract specs. Matching lot sizes between futures and options simplifies hedging and spread strategies. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Since option and futures lot sizes match, delta-hedging an option position with futures is straightforward — 1 lot of delta-1 option ≈ 1 lot of futures.
